legacy_original.goal: 30s continuous local playback runtime over sample; no SoakSimulator, no repeated open/close fake soak

current_implementation.problem: Uses SoakSimulator which is not real runtime soak

reality_proof_requirements.real_30s_playback: Must run real demux/decode pipeline for 30+ seconds
reality_proof_requirements.real_sample_file: Must use actual H.264+AAC MP4 sample
reality_proof_requirements.real_ffmpeg_pipeline: Must use real FFmpeg functions throughout
reality_proof_requirements.real_queue_tracking: Must track actual queue sizes during playback
reality_proof_requirements.real_metrics_collection: Must use real counters from actual pipeline
reality_proof_requirements.no_fake_counters: Must use real counters, not fake ones
reality_proof_requirements.no_repeated_open_close: Must run continuous pipeline, not repeated open/close

required_reality_tests: 30-Second Continuous Playback Test: Run real pipeline for 30+ seconds
Real Queue High-Water Test: Track actual queue sizes during playback
Real Memory Usage Test: Track actual memory allocations
Real Unbounded Growth Test: Detect actual memory leaks
Real Frame Count Test: Count actual decoded frames
Real Byte Count Test: Count actual bytes processed
Real Error Count Test: Count actual errors
Real Duration Test: Measure actual elapsed time
test_requirements: All tests must use real FFmpeg functions (not stubs)
Must track real metrics from actual pipeline
Must handle device unavailable scenarios honestly

inspector_snapshot_requirements.soak_test_snapshot: duration, queue_high_water, memory_usage, frame_counts, byte_counts, error_counts

decision_ledger_requirements.soak_decision: Input: sample_path; Output: success, duration, frames_decoded, bytes_processed

schema_gate_requirements.duration_required: duration must be ≥30 seconds for RUNTIME_PASS

real_soak_runtime_proof: Real queue high water marks from actual pipeline
Real memory usage tracking from actual allocations
Real frame counts from actual decode operations
Real byte counts from actual data processing
Real error counts from actual failures

workspace_requirements: No generated media files in source root

classification_options: RUNTIME_PASS: Real 30s continuous playback with real metrics
CONTRACT_PASS: Interface contract proven but not runtime
FAIL: Required proof missing or conflicting
forbidden_claims: Never claim real soak without real 30s playback
Never claim runtime PASS if BLOCKED_ENV
Never claim real metrics without real counters
Never claim queue high water without real tracking

legacy_original.reason: Micro soak runtime audit requires real 30s continuous playback without SoakSimulator. Current implementation uses SoakSimulator (CONTRACT_PASS). Real queue/memory tracking required for RUNTIME_PASS.
